content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{
  "change_summary": "Implemented the pending PR-watch safety remediation in src/contexts/bead_workflow/pr_watch.rs. Bot body reactions now carry review metadata as BotBodyReview, including reaction timestamp and an explicit approved_head_sha. The watch state machine only merges when the approval is bound to the currently observed status.head_sha, so stale approvals after later PR updates or approvals tied to a different head SHA cannot trigger squash-merge. The process port now reads GitHub PR updatedAt as a conservative review watermark and binds +1 reactions to the current head only when the reaction is newer than that watermark. Added regression coverage for stale approvals and mismatched-head approvals, while preserving existing state-machine tests.",
  "outstanding_risks": [
    "GitHub issue-body reactions are not inherently commit-scoped, so the implementation uses PR updatedAt as a conservative watermark before binding approval to the observed head SHA; non-push PR activity a
